title: Dairy Technician
description: A Dairy Technician in India works in dairy farms, processing units, and laboratories. Their daily tasks involve monitoring milk quality, testing for bacteria and contaminants, and maintaining equipment. They also assist in the production of dairy products like cheese, butter, and ghee.
degree_name: Bachelor of Technology in Dairy Technology

career_progression.year_0_2: Assist in laboratory tests, equipment maintenance, and data entry.
career_progression.year_3_5: Take on supervisory roles, oversee quality control, and assist in research and development.
career_progression.year_6_10: Specialize in areas like dairy product development, quality assurance, or dairy farm management.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Start a dairy farm or processing unit, or create a dairy product brand.
career_progression.global_pathway: Opportunities exist in countries like the US, UK, and Australia, particularly in research and development roles.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Initial years can be challenging, with long working hours and limited job security.
common_misconceptions: Dairy Technicians only work in rural areas
Dairy Technicians have limited career growth opportunities
